MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT LOCAL AREA YELLOW PAGES INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED BY THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT OR JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE FACTS THAT PLAINTIFF LACKS THE CAPACITY TO SUE BASED ON AN INTRASTATE TRANSACTION. (CODE CIV. PROC. 430.10(B); CORP. CODE 2105(A).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Set For Trial On Aug-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-09-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LOCAL AREA YELLOW PAGES INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. It cannot be determined by the allegations of the Complaint or judicially noticeable facts that Plaintiff lacks the capacity to sue based on an intrastate transaction. (Code Civ. Proc. 430.10(b); Corp. Code 2105(a).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
